zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Jonat Sinclair於1134年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，她的父親Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn24歲，母親Margaret Grathney17歲。她於大約1169年與Baron Roland de Mearns在蘇格蘭雷福福爾牛頓 米亞恩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1193年在蘇格蘭雷福福爾牛頓 米亞恩斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Jonat Sinclair于1134年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，她的父亲Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn24岁，母亲Margaret Grathney17岁。她于大约1169年与Baron Roland de Mearns在苏格兰雷福福爾牛頓 米亞恩斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1193年在苏格兰雷福福爾牛頓 米亞恩斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Jonat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Jonat Sinclair was born in 1134, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Grathney, was 17. She married Baron Roland de Mearns about 1169, in Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1193, in Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Jonat Sinclair est née en 1134, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grathney, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Roland de Mearns environ 1169, à Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1193, à Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Jonat Sinclair 1134 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret Grathney 17. Sie hat um 1169 in Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland Baron Roland de Mearns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1193 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Jonat Sinclair è nata il nel 1134 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret Grathney, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Baron Roland de Mearns circa 1169, nel Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1193, nel Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Jonat Sinclairが1134年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslynは24歳，母Margaret Grathneyは17歳であった。約1169年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアニュートン メアルンスでBaron Roland de Mearnsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1193年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアニュートン メアルンスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Jonat Sinclair(이)가 1134년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grathney(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1169년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 뉴턴 미이른스에서 Baron Roland de Mearns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1193년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 뉴턴 미이른스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Jonat Sinclair nasceu em 1134, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grathney, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Roland de Mearns aproximadamente 1169, em Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1193, em Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Jonat Sinclair родилась в 1134 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grathney, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Roland de Mearns около 1169 г. в местности нютон мирнс, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1193 г. в местности нютон мирнс, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Jonat Sinclair nació en 1134, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Grathney, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Baron Roland de Mearns aproximadamente 1169, en Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1193, en Newton Mearns, Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años.
